metadata.title: Café Gourmet — Specialty Coffee from Montréal · Since 1977
metadata.description: A Montréal family roastery since 1977. Single-origin Arabica, signature blends, and custom service from the Stafford family.

home.heroTitle: Coffee from origin, to Montréal, to your cup.
home.heroSubtitle: Two sisters. One family obsession. Nearly fifty years of sourcing exceptional beans from farms we've come to know by name.
home.storyBody: Don and Rita Stafford opened on Greene Avenue in Westmount in 1977 — when most Montrealers had never tasted a single-origin. Almost fifty years later, their daughters still taste every lot themselves. It's the only way to know it's worth your time.

about.title: Don and Rita Stafford. 1977.
about.lede: Café Gourmet started on Greene Avenue in Westmount, opened by Don and Rita Stafford — one of the first specialty coffee centres in Montréal. Forty-nine years on, their daughters are still at it, with the same green-coffee suppliers and the same tasting rituals.
about.foundersCaption: Don and Rita Stafford · Coffee Gourmet Centre · Greene Avenue, 1977
about.section1Body: Don Stafford was a Montréaler who loved wine. In the early '70s, he started noticing that cupping coffee felt a lot like tasting it — the aromatics, the origins, the way one estate could taste nothing like its neighbour. He went deep on the science and the sourcing, and in 1977 he opened The Coffee Gourmet Centre on Greene Avenue in Westmount alongside his wife Rita. It was one of the first specialty coffee shops in the city.
about.section2Title: Greene Avenue, then Marché de l'Ouest
about.section2Body: A second location opened at Marché de l'Ouest on the West Island in 1981. Together Don and Rita built the business over the next decade and a half — direct supplier relationships, careful roasting, customers who knew them by name.
about.section3Body: Don passed in 1994. Rita kept the business going with their daughters — Lynn and Donna — from the family's Dorval showroom. The two of them have been roasting and shipping ever since. Same standards. Same green-coffee suppliers. Same insistence on tasting every lot before it goes out the door.
about.section4Body: Single-origin Arabica from estates we know by name. Roasted to bring out what's actually in the cup, not to cover it up. Smaller batches. Better coffee. No shortcuts, even on the house blend.
about.section5Body: We support the Montreal Children's Hospital Foundation, Enfant-Retour Québec (the Missing Children's Network), and Kingston 4 Paws Service Dogs. Locally, we sponsor Dorval schools and youth sports. Our Beans for Bucks fundraising program lets schools and organizations resell custom-branded bags of coffee or hot chocolate to raise money for their causes.
about.visitBody: 1564 Ch. Herron, Suite 201, Dorval, QC H9S 1B7

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Questions about an order, a custom blend, or a fundraiser? We'd love to hear from you. The Stafford family has been roasting in Montréal since 1977, and a real person will get back to you.

customService.title: Custom Service
customService.intro: Since 1977 we've done more than sell coffee off a shelf. Tell us what you're after and we'll build it with you — a blend, a hard-to-find tea, a gift, or a fundraiser for your organization.
customService.blendBody: Work with us to build a blend that's truly yours. We'll guide you through origins, roast levels, and proportions until the cup is exactly right.
customService.teaBody: Looking for a loose tea you don't see in our shop? Tell us what you'd like and we'll source it for you.
customService.basketsBody: Themed baskets built to suit the occasion. A few favourites to start from:
customService.basketThemes: Oh Canada · Rise and Shine · Chocolate Splurge · Viva Italia · Tea-for-2
customService.fundraisingBody: Raise money for your school, team, or cause by reselling custom-branded coffee and hot chocolate — 200 g bags of coffee or 454 g of Dutch hot chocolate, in reusable bags branded for your organization.
customService.ctaBody: Give us a call or send a note and we'll get started.
